error_signature: chat widget answering with bad answers
title: Chat widget provides incorrect answers due to caching
symptom: The chat widget on the website returns incorrect answers, while the n8n instance responds correctly. This discrepancy is due to browser caching.
applies_when: Using the chat widget on a website
not_this_if: Using incognito mode or a different browser
root_cause: Browser caching can cause outdated or incorrect data to be served to the chat widget, leading to discrepancies in responses. When the cache is not cleared, the widget may not reflect the latest data or configurations.
fix_steps: Alternatively, use incognito mode to bypass the cache
agent_instruction: Clear your browser cache or use incognito mode to test the chat widget.
